rss.title: Hundreds of GPs tell BBC they have never refused a fit note for mental health concerns
rss.snippet: The number of fit notes issued has been rising, with more than 11.2m approved in England last year.

rss.title: 'My hotel bill is £12,000': British holidaymakers stranded by Iran war
rss.snippet: Flights are restricted due to the conflict leaving people stuck running up bills for rooms and food.

rss.title: AI toys for children misread emotions and respond inappropriately, researchers warn
rss.snippet: In first study of its kind, Cambridge researchers found AI toys could misread some children's emotions.

arxiv_papers.title: Global stability of a Hebbian/anti-Hebbian network for principal subspace learning
arxiv_papers.snippet: Biological neural networks self-organize according to local synaptic modifications to produce stable computations. arxiv_papers.title: On graphical domination for threshold-linear networks with recurrent excitation and global inhibition
arxiv_papers.snippet: Graphical domination was first introduced in [1] in the context of combinatorial threshold-linear networks (CTLNs). podcast:
[Essentials: Benefits of Sauna & Deliberate Heat Exposure] In this Huberman Lab Essentials episode, I discuss the mechanisms through which deliberate heat exposure enhances both physical and mental health.
